did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article summarizing existing literature on machine learning and deep learning techniques for skin cancer classification. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML models itself, but rather surveys and categorizes methods (e.g., CNNs, SVMs, transformers) and datasets (e.g., ISIC, HAM10000) used by other researchers.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
